name: Тчиру «Дым»
notes: Tchiru the Smoke, a small goblin alchemist of the Kragmir fighting club and the youngest of its five champions. She wins with gadgets rather than muscle: nonlethal bombs that blind, deafen, and pin, plus smoke and a choking cloud that breaks up a party and smothers its casters.

actions.name: Quick Bomber
actions.text: Tchiru draws a bomb and throws it as a single action, so she can loose two or three bombs in a turn.

actions.name: Concussion Bomb
actions.text: Thrown 20 feet: @Damage[(2d6)[bludgeoning]] plus 2 splash. On a hit: @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]; on a failure the target is deafened 1 and clumsy 1 for 1 round. Spends one Concussion Bomb.

actions.name: Flash Bomb
actions.text: Thrown 20 feet: @Damage[(1d4)[bludgeoning]] plus 1 splash. On a hit: @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]; on a failure the target is dazzled for 1 minute, or blinded for 1 round on a critical failure. Spends one Flash Bomb.

actions.name: Tanglefoot Bomb
actions.text: Thrown 20 feet. On a hit: @Check[type:reflex|dc:24]; on a failure the target is immobilized for 1 round and must Escape or Force Open to break free. Spends one Tanglefoot Bomb.

actions.name: Smoke Bomb
actions.text: Thrown 20 feet. A cloud of smoke with a 10-foot radius lasts 1 minute and makes creatures inside or behind it concealed. Spends one Smoke Bomb.

actions.name: Choking Cloud
actions.text: Frequency once per fight. @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of caustic smoke. Each creature in the area attempts @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]; on a failure it is sickened 1 and cannot use Concentrate actions for 1 round. Spends the Choking Cloud Canister.

actions.name: Debilitating Bomb
actions.text: Every bomb Tchiru throws carries a condition, so her value is control and debuffs rather than raw damage.

description.value: Nonlethal concussive bomb. Thrown 20 feet for 2d6 bludgeoning plus 2 splash; on a hit, DC 24 Fortitude or deafened 1 and clumsy 1 for 1 round.
Blinding flash. Thrown 20 feet; on a hit, DC 24 Fortitude or dazzled for 1 minute, or blinded for 1 round on a critical failure.
Sticky alchemical goo. Thrown 20 feet; on a hit, DC 24 Reflex or immobilized for 1 round (Escape or Force Open to break free).
Thrown 20 feet. A 10-foot-radius cloud of smoke lasts 1 minute and makes creatures inside or behind it concealed.
A single burst of caustic smoke that fills a 15-foot cone. Each creature there attempts a DC 24 Fortitude save or is sickened 1 and cannot use Concentrate actions for 1 round.
